description: Letter to a friend of the late Shemuel b. Ḥofni Gaon complaining that the latter’s son did not keeps the agreements between the writer and Shemuel b. Ḥofni. Verso is blank. Goitein identified the writer as Hayye Gaon (see Goitein notes linked below). Gill and Mann considered the writer to be Dosa Gaon b. Saʿadya (Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, p. 163 and Mann, Texts and Studies, Vol. 1, p. 153.)
tags: hayye, dosa b. saadya, Shemuel b. Hofni
